news.t: Market Leaders and Enhanced Yield: Summit Global Adds to ETF Lineup

holdings.infoBox: LDRX is an equity ETF with a total of 107 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 10.96%, Apple at 9.01%, Alphabet at 8.45%, Microsoft at 6.30%, and Amazon.com at 5.11%.

overview.description: The SGI Enhanced Market Leaders ETF (LDRX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is actively managed, seeking capital appreciation and current income via large-cap equity exposure. The fund also employs an income-generating, short-term options strategy. LDRX was launched on May 5, 2025 and is issued by Summit Global Investments.

data.title: Market Leaders and Enhanced Yield: Summit Global Adds to ETF Lineup
data.text: BOUNTIFUL, Utah , May 8, 2025 /PRNewswire/ -- Summit Global Investments (SGI) has launched the SGI Enhanced Market Leaders ETF (Nasdaq: LDRX), a new actively managed fund designed to offer investors a...
